arts.sum: The Gunners drew a blank against Atalanta in the Champions League on Thursday.

arts.ttl: MARTIN KEOWN TALKS TACTICS: Arsenal must do what they have never done under Mikel Arteta against Man City, expect Kai Havertz to lead the line and the huge task for Erling Haaland
arts.sum: MARTIN KEOWN: This is the era of City and Arsenal, two elite enemies striving for nothing less than excellence whenever they cross that white line - and they meet again on Sunday.

arts.ttl: ‘We go there to win’: Mikel Arteta targets Arsenal glory at Manchester City
arts.sum: ‘We know we need a big performance to beat City’ Riccardo Calafiori could make first start for Gunners Mikel Arteta has told Arsenal’s players they will be aiming for victory at Manchester City on Sunday after receiving criticism for a defensive approach during the 0-0 draw there in March. City pipped Arsenal by a point to claim an unprecedented fourth successive Premier League title, winning their remaining nine matches after that goalless game. Both teams drew 0-0 with Italian opposition in the first round of Champions League matches this week, City held at home by Inter and Arsenal having David Raya to thank for a brilliant double save against Atalanta. Continue reading...
